title: teucrium viscidum var. longibracteatum
intro: Teucrium viscidum var. longibracteatum, also known as Long-bracted Woodland Germander, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Teucrium viscidum var. longibracteatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be made by drying and processing the leaves and flowers of the plant, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
